name: ventura-app-monorepo
description: Monorepo containing Ventura frontend (Flutter) and backend (NestJS microservices)

scripts.install:backend: npm install --prefix backend/api-gateway && npm install --prefix backend/auth-service && npm install --prefix backend/finance-service && npm install --prefix backend/travel-service
scripts.install:all: npm run install:backend && npm run install:frontend
scripts.start:backend: concurrently -n "gateway,auth,finance,travel" -c "blue,green,magenta,yellow" "npm run start:gateway" "npm run start:auth" "npm run start:finance" "npm run start:travel"
